nasb.text: The Levites, their relatives, had charge of the treasures of the house of God and of the treasures of the dedicated gifts.

esv.text: And of the Levites, Ahijah had charge of the treasuries of the house of God and the treasuries of the dedicated gifts.

cnv.text: 他們其他的利未親族，就管理神殿裡的庫房和聖物的庫房。

ccb.text: 利未人亚希雅负责掌管上帝殿里的库房和放奉献之物的库房。
